name: Profile_R5_GraphDefinition_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.GraphDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 GraphDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 GraphDefinition resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.GraphDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 GraphDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 GraphDefinition resources.

element.short: R5: Additional identifier for the GraphDefinition (business identifier) (new)
element.comment:
Element `GraphDefinition.identifier` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.identifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `GraphDefinition.identifier`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-identifier`.

Element `GraphDefinition.versionAlgorithm[x]` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.versionAlgorithm[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `GraphDefinition.versionAlgorithm[x]`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-versionAlgorithm`.
If set as a string, this is a FHIRPath expression that has two additional context variables passed in - %version1 and %version2 and will return a negative number if version1 is newer, a positive number if version2 and a 0 if the version ordering can't be successfully be determined.

element.short: R5: Name for this graph definition (human friendly) (new)
element.comment:
Element `GraphDefinition.title` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.title` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `GraphDefinition.title`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-title`.
This name does not need to be machine-processing friendly and may contain punctuation, white-space, etc.

Element `GraphDefinition.copyright` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `GraphDefinition.copyright`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-copyright`.
...

Element `GraphDefinition.copyrightLabel` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.copyrightLabel` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `GraphDefinition.copyrightLabel`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-copyrightLabel`.
The (c) symbol should NOT be included in this string. It will be added by software when rendering the notation. Full details about licensing, restrictions, warrantees, etc. goes in the more general 'copyright' element.

element.short: R5: Potential target for the link (new)
element.comment:
Element `GraphDefinition.node` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.node` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Source Node for this link (new)
element.comment:
Element `GraphDefinition.link.sourceId` has a context of GraphDefinition.link based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.link.sourceId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Target Node for this link (new)
element.comment:
Element `GraphDefinition.link.targetId` has a context of GraphDefinition.link based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.link.targetId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `GraphDefinition.link.params` has a context of GraphDefinition.link based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.link.params` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
At least one of the parameters must have the value {ref} which identifies the focus resource.

Element `GraphDefinition.link.compartment` has a context of GraphDefinition.link based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.link.compartment` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
